headline: Forklift accident on job Preparation Checklist — Boise Idaho
articleBody:
Forklift accident on job Preparation Checklist for Boise Idaho Clients

Before your Forklift accident on job appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
